hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -WindowStyle Hidden -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.BalloonTipTitle = 'Claude Code 세션 시작'; $n.BalloonTipText = 'SOP 워크벤치 작업이 시작되었습니다.'; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(4000); Start-Sleep 5; $n.Dispose()"
